checklist.description: The migration.sql includes a DROP FUNCTION (or DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS) statement for diary_search before the CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION statement
checklist.name: DROP FUNCTION before CREATE

checklist.description: The updated RETURNS TABLE clause includes `verified boolean` (or equivalent)
checklist.name: verified column in RETURNS TABLE

checklist.description: The function body's RETURN QUERY SELECT includes `e.verified` from the diary_entries table
checklist.name: verified in SELECT

checklist.description: The notes.md or migration output mentions checking that the new _journal.json entry's `when` value is monotonically greater than the previous entry, OR the agent produces a corrected _journal.json
checklist.name: Journal timestamp checked

checklist.description: The notes.md explains that DROP is required because the return type changed (not just input params), or mentions that CREATE OR REPLACE cannot change RETURNS TABLE
checklist.name: Notes explain DROP requirement

context: Tests whether the agent knows that (1) PostgreSQL requires DROP FUNCTION before CREATE OR REPLACE when the RETURNS TABLE signature changes, and (2) drizzle-kit generates non-monotonic journal timestamps when the repo uses synthetic future-dated values — the agent must check and fix the journal entry.
